title: Brazilian Chicken Skewers with Peppery Chimichurri
description: A flavorful and spicy Mexican-inspired dish featuring marinated chicken skewers served with a tangy and herby peppery chimichurri sauce.

ingredients.name: skewers
ingredients.notes: Soaked in water for 30 minutes before use

instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine peppery chimichurri sauce, olive oil, lime juice, rich adobo seasoning, brazilian chili powder, garlic, and chopped cilantro. Blend until smooth.
Thread chicken breast onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the chicken skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve the chicken skewers with the peppery chimichurri sauce for dipping.
Garnish with additional chopped cilantro, if desired.
